name: Suncrete, Inc.
business: Suncrete is a ready-mix concrete logistics and distribution platform serving the construction industry in Oklahoma, Arkansas, Texas, and Louisiana. It produces and delivers ready-mix concrete to infrastructure, commercial, and residential customers. The company also sells sand products.

exposures.sentence: We are a ready-mix concrete logistics and distribution platform operating across Oklahoma, Arkansas, Louisiana and Texas with plans to expand throughout the high-growth U.S. Sunbelt region through strategic acquisitions and organic growth.
Approximately 36.7% of our revenue for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025, was from residential construction contractors.

During the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025, we generated approximately 15.8% of our construction contract revenues from publicly funded projects and the sale of ready-mix concrete to public customers at the federal, state and local levels.

catalysts.sentence: On October 17, 2025, we completed the Thunder Acquisition.
On December 30, 2025, the Company entered into a five-year $4.8 million equipment security note (Equipment Loan).
On April 8, 2026 (the Closing Date), Suncrete, Inc. (Suncrete) consummated its previously announced business combination ...
On April 28, 2026, we completed the acquisition of the Hope Companies (the Hope Acquisition).

On April 29, 2026, we acquired a ready-mix concrete company in Southern Louisiana for aggregate consideration consisting of (i) $31.0 million in cash at closing, (ii) 259,291 shares of Class A Common Stock issued to the sellers at closing and (iii) an earnout payment of up to $10.0 million.
On May 6, 2026, we completed the acquisition of the Nelson Acquired Companies pursuant to the Nelson Purchase Agreement (the Nelson Acquisition).
